themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "And the whole assembly took counsel to keep other seven days: and they kept other seven days...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיַּֽעֲשׂ֣וּ: kept - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
